allow: PowerShell($tempDir = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp\\claude"; if \(Test-Path $tempDir\) { Get-ChildItem -Path $tempDir -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-15\) -and \($_.Length -gt 50000\) } | Select-Object FullName, @{N='SizeKB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize })
